issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks across multiple workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in multiple workflows simultaneously, causing TCs and HAs to receive duplicate tasks. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and the issue was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals that previously fell out of contract
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then flipped back to a prior stage due to a terminated contract, and then moved back to Offer Accepted again, the workflow tasks did not re-trigger. This was because deal stage re-enrollment criteria for Offer Accepted was missing from the workflow. The fix was adding Offer Accepted as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that went through a second Offer Accepted stage change during the impact window to ensure TC tasks are generated.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly suppressing enrollment for these terminal deal stages. A tweak to the workflow filters was applied to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually delete any open check-in tasks for deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: LO contact info not updating in automated emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The issue affected agent-facing automated emails and was resolved by Luis on the product side. Root cause was not explicitly stated.
issues.workaround: Manually resend any agent-facing emails that went out with the incorrect LO information during the impact window.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks after referral accepted on March 18th
issues.desc: An HA reported receiving no workflow tasks after a referral was made and accepted on March 18th. The issue was traced to an error in how data was being pulled, preventing the workflow from filtering correctly. The fix was escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll the affected deal into the post-referral workflow and complete any outstanding tasks that should have been generated since March 18th.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent at Offer Accepted stage before closing info is available
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their credit amount was incorrectly triggering at the Offer Accepted stage, before closing information had been submitted and the credit amount could be calculated. The SMS should only send at the Sale Pending stage when the credit amount is known. The issue was identified as a dash-triggered message and escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually send the correct buyer credit SMS with the accurate credit amount to any buyers who received the premature message during the impact window.
